headline: Darden Restaurants To Rally Around 19%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Tuesday
summary: Wall Street analysts changed outlook on top names. Wedbush raised Replimune's price target, Canaccord cut Strategy's target, Barclays upgraded Watts Water, Rosenblatt boosted Comcast, Goldman increased State Street, Evercore raised Owens Corning, Cantor Fitzgerald boosted BioCryst Pharma, BTIG raised Edwards Lifesciences.

headline: BTIG Maintains Buy on Edwards Lifesciences, Raises Price Target to $110
summary: BTIG  analyst Marie Thibault   maintains Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE:EW) with a Buy and raises the price target from $100 to $110.

raw.headline: BTIG Maintains Buy on Edwards Lifesciences, Raises Price Target to $110

headline: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) Is Up 6.2% After New TAVR Data at New York Valves Conference
summary: In late June 2026, Edwards Lifesciences presented extensive new clinical data at the New York Valves conference, reinforcing evidence across its aortic, mitral and tricuspid transcatheter valve therapies, including PROGRESS, PARTNER 3, EARLY TAVR, PASCAL and SAPIEN M3 programs. An important takeaway is how the PROGRESS trial’s baseline data on moderate aortic stenosis and long-term durability findings for SAPIEN 3 deepen understanding of earlier, less invasive treatment options for complex...
